name: EmitHQ
description: Open-source webhook infrastructure platform. Send and receive webhooks with Standard Webhooks signing, automatic retries, dead-letter queues, and a real-time dashboard.

auth.description: API key with emhq_ prefix. Obtain via POST /api/v1/signup (no browser required) or the dashboard.

capabilities.name: signup
capabilities.description: Create an account, organization, and API key in one request. No browser required.

capabilities.name: send_webhook
capabilities.description: Send a webhook event to all matching endpoints for an application.

capabilities.name: manage_endpoints
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, delete, and test webhook delivery endpoints.

capabilities.name: manage_applications
capabilities.description: Create and list applications (logical groupings of endpoints).

capabilities.name: replay_deliveries
capabilities.description: Retry failed or exhausted webhook deliveries.

capabilities.name: check_quota
capabilities.description: Every API response includes X-EmitHQ-Quota-* headers showing current usage and limits.

capabilities.name: manage_billing
capabilities.description: View subscription, create checkout sessions, access Stripe customer portal.
